underlying_goal: Get a comprehensive audit of the codebase health, documentation, plans/roadmap coherence, and get Claude's honest strategic feedback on the project direction
friction_detail: Claude suggested killing the annotation tool without understanding the existing CryptOfCogito tool and Phase 4 plans, prompting user pushback.
brief_summary: User wanted a full codebase and roadmap audit with strategic feedback; Claude delivered the audit but made a bad strategic recommendation about killing the annotation tool.
